name: BUERGER DISEASE
definition: THROMBANGIITIS OBLITERANS idiopathic recurrent segmental obliterative vasculitis of small + medium-sized peripheral

demographics.Frequency: < 1% of all chronic vascular diseases; more common in Israel, Orient, India

discriminating_features: arterial occlusions, tapered narrowing of arteries
direct collateral following the path of the original artery (Martorell sign) in 80%
skip lesions = multiple segments involved with portions of arterial wall remaining unaffected

general: arterial occlusions, tapered narrowing of arteries
direct collateral following the path of the original artery (Martorell sign) in 80%
skip lesions = multiple segments involved with portions of arterial wall remaining unaffected
absence of generalized arteriosclerosis / arterial calcifications (90%)
